name: Allergy and Immunology
description: Diagnosis and treatment of allergies, asthma, immunodeficiency, and immune-mediated disease.

name: Anesthesiology
description: Perioperative medicine, pain control, airway management, and anesthesia for procedures.

name: Cardiology
description: Heart and vascular disease evaluation, imaging, rhythm disorders, and medical cardiovascular care.

name: Cardiothoracic Surgery
description: Operative treatment of heart, lung, mediastinal, and thoracic diseases.

name: Clinical Genetics
description: Inherited disorders, genomic counseling, risk assessment, and diagnostic interpretation.

name: Critical Care Medicine
description: Management of life-threatening illness, organ support, and intensive care.

name: Dermatology
description: Diseases of skin, hair, nails, mucosa, and cutaneous procedures.

name: Emergency Medicine
description: Acute illness and trauma assessment, stabilization, and urgent treatment.

name: Endocrinology
description: Hormonal and metabolic disorders including diabetes, thyroid, pituitary, and adrenal disease.

name: Family Medicine
description: Comprehensive primary care across lifespan, prevention, chronic disease, and common acute illness.

name: Forensic Medicine
description: Medical examination related to injury, death investigation, and legal evidence.

name: Gastroenterology
description: Diseases of esophagus, stomach, intestines, liver, pancreas, and biliary tract.

name: General Practice
description: Broad front-line outpatient care, preventive care, and coordination of referrals.

name: General Surgery
description: Operative and perioperative care for abdominal, soft tissue, endocrine, and emergency surgical disease.

name: Geriatrics
description: Care of older adults with frailty, multimorbidity, cognition, and functional decline.

name: Gynecologic Oncology
description: Cancer prevention, surgery, and systemic coordination for gynecologic malignancies.

name: Gynecology
description: Female reproductive health, menstrual disorders, pelvic disease, and preventive screening.

name: Hematology
description: Blood disorders including anemia, clotting disease, marrow disorders, and cellular diagnostics.

name: Hematology and Oncology
description: Combined care of blood disorders and cancer.

name: Hepatology
description: Liver disease including hepatitis, cirrhosis, portal hypertension, and liver failure.

name: Hospital Medicine
description: Inpatient adult medical management, transitions of care, and acute ward-based treatment.

name: Infectious Diseases
description: Bacterial, viral, fungal, and parasitic disease diagnosis, treatment, and prevention.

name: Internal Medicine
description: Adult medicine focused on diagnosis, chronic disease management, and complex multisystem illness.

name: Interventional Cardiology
description: Catheter-based diagnosis and treatment of coronary and structural heart disease.

name: Interventional Radiology
description: Image-guided minimally invasive diagnosis and procedures.

name: Medical Microbiology
description: Laboratory diagnosis of infectious organisms and antimicrobial testing.

name: Medical Oncology
description: Systemic cancer therapy including chemotherapy, targeted therapy, and immunotherapy.

name: Neonatology
description: Care of newborns, especially premature and critically ill infants.

name: Nephrology
description: Kidney disease, electrolyte disorders, hypertension, and dialysis care.

name: Neurology
description: Disorders of brain, spinal cord, peripheral nerves, and neuromuscular system.

name: Neurosurgery
description: Operative treatment of brain, spine, peripheral nerve, and cerebrovascular disorders.

name: Nuclear Medicine
description: Diagnostic and therapeutic use of radiopharmaceuticals.

name: Obstetrics
description: Pregnancy, childbirth, maternal-fetal monitoring, and peripartum care.

name: Obstetrics and Gynecology
description: Combined specialty covering pregnancy and female reproductive health.

name: Occupational Medicine
description: Health effects of workplace exposures, fitness for duty, and work-related disease.

name: Ophthalmology
description: Eye diseases, vision disorders, ocular surgery, and visual system diagnostics.

name: Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery
description: Surgical treatment of facial, jaw, oral, and dental-related conditions.

name: Orthopedic Surgery
description: Bones, joints, ligaments, tendons, fractures, and musculoskeletal surgery.

name: Otolaryngology
description: Ear, nose, throat, head, and neck disorders and surgery.

name: Pain Medicine
description: Evaluation and management of acute, chronic, and procedural pain.

name: Palliative Medicine
description: Symptom control, serious illness support, and goal-concordant care.

name: Pathology
description: Tissue, cytology, autopsy, and laboratory-based disease diagnosis.

name: Pediatric Cardiology
description: Congenital and acquired heart disease in children.

name: Pediatric Endocrinology
description: Hormonal, growth, and metabolic disorders in children.

name: Pediatric Gastroenterology
description: Digestive and liver disease in infants, children, and adolescents.

name: Pediatric Hematology-Oncology
description: Blood disorders and cancer in children.

name: Pediatric Infectious Diseases
description: Infectious disease diagnosis and treatment in children.

name: Pediatric Nephrology
description: Kidney and urinary disorders in children.

name: Pediatric Neurology
description: Neurologic and neurodevelopmental disorders in children.

name: Pediatric Pulmonology
description: Respiratory disease and chronic lung conditions in children.

name: Pediatric Surgery
description: Operative treatment of congenital and acquired surgical disease in children.

name: Pediatrics
description: Medical care of infants, children, and adolescents.

name: Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation
description: Function restoration, disability care, rehabilitation, and musculoskeletal recovery.

name: Plastic Surgery
description: Reconstructive and aesthetic surgery of skin, soft tissue, hand, and craniofacial structures.

name: Preventive Medicine
description: Population health, screening, occupational and public-health-oriented prevention.

name: Psychiatry
description: Mental disorders, psychopharmacology, psychotherapy, and behavioral health.

name: Pulmonology
description: Lung and airway disease including asthma, COPD, interstitial and sleep-related disorders.

name: Radiation Oncology
description: Cancer treatment using ionizing radiation.

name: Radiology
description: Diagnostic imaging including X-ray, CT, MRI, ultrasound, and image interpretation.

name: Reproductive Endocrinology and Infertility
description: Fertility disorders, assisted reproduction, and reproductive hormone disease.

name: Rheumatology
description: Autoimmune, inflammatory, and connective tissue disease.

name: Sleep Medicine
description: Sleep disorders such as apnea, insomnia, hypersomnia, and circadian disease.

name: Sports Medicine
description: Exercise-related injury, performance-related musculoskeletal care, and return-to-play guidance.

name: Transfusion Medicine
description: Blood banking, component therapy, compatibility testing, and apheresis.

name: Trauma Surgery
description: Emergency operative care for severe injury and surgical critical care.

name: Urology
description: Urinary tract disease and male reproductive system disorders.

name: Vascular Surgery
description: Operative and endovascular treatment of arterial, venous, and lymphatic disease.
